products.name: Zucchini pancakes
products.description: Every Sunday, Paula's farm holds a grand family gathering with various types of delicious food. These are also available for pre-order and sale here when needed. Savory zucchini pancakes, a family gathering favorite.

products.name: Chinese tea eggs
products.description: Traditional savory eggs marbled with tea and spices.

products.name: Fired sausage and potato with egg pancakes
products.description: A hearty combination of sausage, potatoes, and egg pancakes.

products.name: Grilled steak
products.description: Perfectly grilled steak, served during our family gatherings.

products.name: Beef Stew
products.description: Slow-cooked, rich beef stew for a cozy family meal.

products.name: Dumplings
products.description: Hand-folded dumplings with savory fillings.

products.name: Egg pancakes with various toppings
products.description: Versatile egg pancakes served with a variety of fresh toppings.

products.name: Japanese curry rice and fried chicken tenders combo
products.description: A delicious combo of Japanese curry rice and crispy fried chicken tenders.

products.name: Ramen
products.description: Authentic ramen with rich broth and fresh noodles.

products.name: Spam fried rice (Optional: with Gochujang)
products.description: Savory fried rice with spam, with an optional Gochujang kick.

products.name: Creamy corn with garlic bread
products.description: Rich creamy corn paired with crispy garlic bread.

products.name: Corn chowder
products.description: Hearty and creamy corn chowder, a gathering staple.

products.name: Baby Chicks
products.description: Healthy, lively baby chicks from our best layers. Available in seasonal batches.

products.name: Farm Fresh Eggs (Dozen)
products.description: One dozen fresh, pasture-raised eggs from our happy hens.

products.name: Weekly Egg Reserve
products.description: Prefer a regular pickup? Tell us how many dozen you want each week and we’ll do our best to set them aside.

products.name: Chicken Coop Visit
products.description: See the coop in action and meet the hens. Great for families and curious egg lovers.

products.name: Hen Spotlight
products.description: A fun add-on to your pickup—ask which hens are laying today and what we’re seeing in the coop.

products.name: Coop Morning Update
products.description: A quick morning snapshot from the coop with availability notes for today’s egg pickups.

products.name: Hardwood Cutting Board
products.description: Handmade by the family shop. Each board has unique grain and character.

products.name: Farmhouse Decor Sign
products.description: Rustic wood signage for your kitchen, porch, or pantry. Custom text available.

products.name: Wall Shelf
products.description: A simple handmade shelf for entryways, kitchens, or anywhere you want a little extra charm.

products.name: Thomas's Handmade Stool
products.description: A sturdy little stool with clean lines—great as a step, seat, or plant stand.

products.name: Body Butter
products.description: All-natural body butter designed to nourish and hydrate—especially for sensitive skin.

products.name: Muscle Crème
products.description: A soothing crème made with botanicals like boswellia, comfrey, peppermint, and eucalyptus.

journalPosts.title: Spring Egg Collecting
journalPosts.excerpt: Longer days mean more coop checks, more stories, and a little more dust on our boots.
journalPosts.body: Spring is our favorite season on the farm. The hens are active, the air is warm, and mornings start with a quick walk to the coop. If you want eggs this week, call or text and we’ll let you know what we have ready for pickup.

farmRegions.title: Chicken Coop
farmRegions.description: Where the day starts: fresh eggs, feed time, and a lot of personality.

farmRegions.title: Family Woodshop
farmRegions.description: Our small shop where woodcraft gets sketched, cut, sanded, and finished by hand.
